titleStmt.title: SII 24.261: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 261. (A.R. No. 362 of 1953-54.) WALL BEHIND THE ĀCHCHĀVAYYAṈ SHRINE, TO THE EAST OF MĒṬṬAḺAGIYA-ŚIṄGAR SHRINE.

summary.p: Partly covered up under the floor. Registers a gift of land for a gōśāla (tirukkōśālaippuṟa-iṟaiyili) by one of the palace officers (aṟaimaṉai-pradhāni) of Puttūr in Tuḷumaṇḍalam (name lost), for the welfare of the chief queen (paṭṭattup-periyaraśi) Vijvala-Mahādēvī. The gift is said to have been approved by Jaṭāvarman Vikrama-Pāṇḍyadēva in the 4th year and 270th day of his reign at the instance of Aṇṇaṉ Vāṇādhirājar and the gift land seems to have formed part of Vikramapāṇḍya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Pāṇḍimaṇḍalam evidently named after the Pāṇḍya king. The title Jaṭāvarman is obviously a mistake for Māṟavarman since no Pāṇḍya king bearing the title Jaṭāvarman and the name Vikramapāṇḍya is known to have existed during this period. On the other hand, a Māṟavarman Vikramapāṇḍya is known to have commenced to rule from c. 1249 A.D., with whom this Vikramapāṇḍya may be identified.
The portion containing the regnal year of the king is lost. The details śu. 5, Monday, Tiruvōṇam, are insufficient for calculating the date of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ sārvvabhauma śrīmatpratāpaccakravarttikaḷ pocaḷa śrī vīraso yaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattunāḷ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ tirussurabhikaḷukku svastiśrīman mahā pratāpaccakravarttikaḷ pocaḷa śrī vīrasomīśvaradevaracar paṭṭattupperiyaraci vijvalamahādeviyāṟkku
naṉṟāka Ivar Araimaṉaipradhānikaḷil tuḷumaṇṭalattup puttūr kācu paṭavaḷa puṟamākap pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu Iṭuvittuttantavūrukku śrī koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉatribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrī vikramapāṇḍyadevar tantaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tribhuvanaccakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap peru māḷ koyiṟ
tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ tirussurabhika kkolum koṇṭu Iṭuvikkat teṉkaḷavaḻi nāṭṭu vikrama pāṇḍyaccaturvvedimaṅgalam nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñceyyum puṉ ceyyum nattamum toṭṭamum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉamum paḷḷiccantamum maṭap
puṟamum vaḻinallūr Aḻakapperumāḷ viṇṇakaremperumāṉukkuk kār ṉanilamum tiruveḷḷāṉaiviṭaṅkar koyiṟ tampirāṭṭikku kārāṇmai Uṭpaṭṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilamum tevatāṉappaṇi ceyvṛttippaṅku Irupatāl vanta nilamum nikki Uḷḷa nilam kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum
ñcupili sandhivigrahappeṟum vācalpeṟum Ilāñ caṉappeṟum Araciravu valum kutiraivariyum taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārappāṭṭam cekkiṟai yiṭaiyarvari yiṉavari poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa
kālum mutal virapāṇṭiyaṉāl nellu mukkalamum kuṟuvai viḷainta(ta)nilattukku muḻuvaricaiyil Oṉṟu mukkālum Aippacikkuṟuvai viḷainilattukku Oṉṟupātiyum tulāiṟaittu viḷainta nila
Oṉṟum Āka nālāvatu mutal tirukkocālaippuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṟuppatāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aṇṇaṉ vāṇādhirājar namakkuccoṉṉamaiyil Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ
kalam nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñceyyum puṉceyyum nattamum toṭṭamum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉamum paḷḷic cantamum maṭappuṟamum vaḻinallūr Aḻaka
kuk kārāṇmai Uṭpaṭṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilamum tevatāṉap paṇiceyvṛttip paṅku Irupatāl vanta nilamum nikki Uḷḷa nilam kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum ta va
Iṟai taṭṭārappāṭṭam cekkiṟai Iṭaiyarvari Iṉavari poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavu muṭpaṭa Ivvāṇṭu mutal tirukkocālaipuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṟuppa ka
cakkarapāṇinallūr Āṇṭapirāṉ paṭṭālakaṉāṉa pañcavatarayaṉeḻuttu 2 yāṇṭu 4[§] 100 7 10 Ivai cevvirukkai nāṭṭuc cakkarapāṇi nallur Arayaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa kumaṇarāyaṉeḻuttu
Itu patiṉeṭṭumaṇṭalattu śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 24.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
